name: Crock Pot Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Del Monte chili style stewed tomatoes
cayenne pepper or hot sauce to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown ground beef or venison with onion, garlic, and green pepper in a skillet.
2. Drain excess fat and transfer the mixture to the crockpot.
3. Add the drained black beans, kidney beans, tomatoes, water, beef bouillon cube, Worcestershire sauce, dried herbs (basil, oregano, thyme, rosemary), cayenne pepper or hot sauce, cilantro, and chili powder.
4. Stir to combine all ingredients.
5. Cook on low-medium setting for several hours until the flavors are well-developed.
6. Optionally, serve with chopped onion, shredded cheese, sour cream, and tortillas.
